step1.label: Environment
step1.title: Environment Constraints
step1.topologyRequired: Please select a topology to continue

step3.label: Architecture
step3.title: Architecture Selection
step3.selectionRequired: Please confirm an architecture to continue

environment.label: Environment Type
environment.maxNodesHint: Optional — limits total node count for topology recommendations

toolbar.sessionImportError: Invalid session file. Please select a valid os-sizer session.

validation.techPreviewNotForProduction: Technology Preview — not supported for production use
validation.redfishBmcRequired: Requires Redfish-compatible BMC on both nodes
validation.managedCloudNoHardware: Managed cloud topologies (ROSA/ARO) are sized by the provider — no hardware BoM is required
validation.workerRamBelowMin: Worker node RAM is below the 8 GB minimum — sizing may be invalid
validation.workerCpuBelowMin: Worker node vCPU is below the 2 vCPU minimum — sizing may be invalid
validation.zeroPodsWithResources: Pod count is zero but CPU/RAM requests are set — check your workload profile
validation.odfIncompatibleTopology: ODF storage is not compatible with SNO, MicroShift, or Managed Cloud topologies
validation.rhacmNoClusters: RHACM is enabled but no managed cluster count is set — enter expected cluster count

tna.techPreview: Two-Node with Arbiter is a Technology Preview feature

tnf.techPreview: Two-Node with Fencing is a Technology Preview feature
tnf.redfishRequired: Requires Redfish-compatible BMC on both nodes

managedCloud.noHardware: Managed cloud topologies (ROSA/ARO) are sized by the provider — no hardware BoM is required

virt.rwxStorageRequired: OpenShift Virtualization requires RWX-capable storage for live migration. Configure ODF or another RWX storage class to enable live migration.

sno.virtNoLiveMigration: SNO topology does not support live migration — VM HA is unavailable.

gpu.passthroughBlocksLiveMigration: GPU passthrough mode permanently blocks live migration on affected nodes.
gpu.migProfileWithKubevirtUnsupported: MIG profiles combined with KubeVirt VMs are unsupported by the standard GPU Operator.

standardHa.production: Best for production workloads requiring full HA in a datacenter
standardHa.virtWorkloads: Recommended for VM workloads — standard HA provides live migration and node redundancy.

compact3Node.budgetFriendly: Suitable for resource-constrained environments with HA — masters double as workers

sno.edgeSingleSite: Single node deployment for edge or far-edge locations

tna.minimalHa: Minimal HA with a witness/arbiter node — budget-friendly two-node cluster

tnf.twoNodeFencing: Two-node cluster with hardware fencing for bare-metal HA

hcp.multiClusterEfficiency: Efficient multi-cluster management with hosted control planes

microshift.constrainedEdge: Minimal footprint for far-edge IoT and device workloads

managedCloud.noHardwareManagement: Provider-managed OpenShift — no hardware sizing required (ROSA/ARO/OSD)

gpu.densityNote: Values are estimates. Actual density depends on NVIDIA vGPU driver version and license tier.
